ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used by the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the user belongs to */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Known health conditions of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for tracking and notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartphone, laptop) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "screen_size" REAL /* Screen size of the device */,
  "battery_life" INTEGER /* Average battery life of the device */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data sync */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for nested categories) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category this type belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration for this type of activity */,
  "recommended_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency for this type of activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
column_names: ID of the device used by the user
ID of the organization the user belongs to
Known health conditions of the user
User preferences for tracking and notifications
